seo.title: Dynamic Poster Creation – AI Animated Poster Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Transform static images into dynamic animated posters with AI. Create eye-catching motion graphics by combining character photos with AI-generated scenes and video effects using Nano Banana Pro.

hero.title: Dynamic Poster Creation
hero.description: Transform static images into captivating dynamic posters with AI. Upload a character photo, combine it with AI-generated scenes, add motion effects like falling snow—and bring your visuals to life with subtle animations.

steps.title: Upload your character or product image
steps.description: Provide a photo of a person, product, or any subject you want to animate. The AI will preserve the character's appearance while creating dynamic scenes.

steps.title: AI generates scene composition
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro combines your image with a reference scene, creating a new composition that maintains character consistency while placing them in an engaging environment.

steps.title: Add dynamic effects and atmosphere
steps.description: The AI enhances the scene with atmospheric effects like falling snow, particles, or other motion elements that add depth and visual interest to your poster.

steps.title: Generate animated video poster
steps.description: The final step transforms your enhanced image into a subtle motion video, with characters and elements gently animated to create an eye-catching dynamic poster.

whoIsFor.title: Perfect for marketers and creators who want standout visuals
whoIsFor.subtitle: From social media to advertising, see who creates dynamic posters with AI.

audiences.label: Social media marketers
audiences.description: Create scroll-stopping animated content that outperforms static images. Dynamic posters drive higher engagement and click-through rates on social platforms.

audiences.label: Brand designers
audiences.description: Elevate brand campaigns with motion graphics that capture attention. Transform product shots and brand imagery into premium animated content.

audiences.label: E-commerce sellers
audiences.description: Make product listings stand out with animated hero images. Dynamic posters showcase products in engaging ways that static photos can't match.

audiences.label: Event promoters
audiences.description: Create eye-catching promotional materials for events, launches, and campaigns. Animated posters generate more buzz and shares than traditional graphics.

items.question: What is the Dynamic Poster Creation workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow transforms static images into animated dynamic posters. It combines character photos with AI-generated scenes, adds atmospheric effects, and creates subtle motion animations—perfect for social media and marketing content.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro (google/gemini-3.0-flash-image) for scene composition and image editing, and Seedance (doubao-seedance-1-0-pro) for generating the final animated video with subtle motion effects.

items.question: What kind of images work best?
items.answer: Character photos, product images, and portraits work excellently. The AI preserves the subject's appearance while creating dynamic scenes around them. Both people and products can be animated effectively.

items.question: What effects can be added to the poster?
items.answer: The workflow can add various atmospheric effects like falling snow, particles, light rays, and ambient motion. These effects enhance the visual appeal while maintaining focus on your main subject.

items.question: What's the output format and quality?
items.answer: The workflow generates high-quality video files in 9:16 (vertical) or 16:9 (horizontal) aspect ratios, optimized for social media platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and digital advertising.

items.question: How long is the animated poster?
items.answer: The generated dynamic poster is a short looping video, typically 3-5 seconds, designed to capture attention quickly and loop seamlessly for social media autoplay.

items.question: Can I customize the scene and effects?
items.answer: Yes. You can provide reference images for the scene style and specify the type of effects you want. The AI adapts to your creative direction while maintaining character consistency.

items.question: How are credits calculated?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the AI models used—Nano Banana Pro for image composition and Seedance for video generation. The cost reflects the value of creating professional animated marketing content.
